ratings.comment: Professor Mahvi is one of the best professors in the department. Her explanations of heat transfer was very clear and well documented. Her handwritten lecture notes were easy to follow, and she was always willing to stop and answer questions. Exams, although difficult covered content that was in-line with class. I highly recommended her for 364!

She's an alright teacher but this is a tough class and it could still use some improvements. Lecture examples often aren't great preparation for assignments, and homework has a lot of specific requirements for showing work. Some homework is more about debugging EES than actual concepts. Most of the issues will probably improve with time, though.

Professor Mahvi was excellent. The notes for class were very well organized. The subject was well covered and she solicited feedback from the class multiple times. The course had 2 exams and a final project with presentations. Homework was challenging, but not relentless.
